label: House Mode
info: House Mode orchestrator (STATE-ONLY). Occupancy Home/Away/Sleeping + storm/maintenance/guest overlays. Sleeping = 23:00–07:00 + adult home + 20m no-activity (motion/presence, any light on-off, any dimmer press) + TVs off + sitting-room lights off. Wake = first activity from 06:00 (2h re-entry block). No tag. No consumers wired yet.
